title: crataegus laevigata subsp. vulgaris
intro: Crataegus laevigata subsp. vulgaris, also known as Midland hawthorn, is a subspecies of hawthorn tree native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Crataegus laevigata subsp. vulgaris include lowering blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and reducing symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to support heart health and overall well-being.
